description: A satellite operator must monitor real-time telemetry data to ensure the spacecraft is operating within normal parameters.

nodes.task_description: Establish a connection with the satellite during its pass over the ground station.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully connects to the satellite.

nodes.task_description: Monitor key telemetry channels, including battery voltage, temperature, and subsystem status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent observes all telemetry data and confirms they are within predefined limits.

nodes.task_description: Log the telemetry data for the duration of the pass and flag any anomalies.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully logs all data and notes no anomalies were detected.
